title: It is insane
overview: Hisone Amakasu enlists in the Air Self-Defense Force, where an encounter with a dragon concealed inside a hangar alters her career path forever.

title: I name the dragon Masotan
overview: After her successful test run flying the dragon, Hisone is asked by flight suit developer Hiroki Ikushima to review prototype suits.

title: Take responsibility, would you?
overview: Promoted to technical sergeant, Hisone undergoes fighter pilot training with the F-15J unit. The Gifu Air Base prepares for its annual air show.

title: Those guys have come over to Gifu
overview: Joined by pilots and their dragons from other military bases, Hisone participates in a joint training exercise held at the Gifu Air Base.

title: Who likes to be disliked?
overview: Sent to a remote island for a field training exercise, the dragon pilots are given a week to escape back to Gifu Air Base using any method they can.

title: I will call your name
overview: While Hisone, Liliko and Mayumi await their scheduled extraction from the remote island, El is determined to leave before their time is up.

title: Kingdom of Love
overview: Fearing that romantic relationships may become a distraction, Iiboshi orders the airbase staff to assess the relationship potential of each pilot.

title: Limited time offer! Spicy granny flavor
overview: As Iiboshi reveals the true mission behind the dragon pilot program, a former pilot from long ago appears before the Gifu Air Base flight crew.

title: eeeeeeeeeek!
overview: With the mission date nearing, the dragon pilots are sent on a test run. One of the shrine maidens questions Hisone's relationship with Okonogi.

title: Melty Love
overview: A ceremony is held to select which shrine maiden will lead the ritual. Zaito is ordered to make a difficult decision for the sake of El's career.

title: Montparnasse sky and scum girl
overview: While Hisone follows through with her career decision, the remaining dragon pilots accompany Okonogi and the shrine maidens on their joint mission.

title: Invincible us
overview: As the mission proceeds under the watchful eye of the command center, Hinomoto reflects upon the events that transpired during the previous ritual.
